name: comments
description: Diskusi per lesson (fase-2 #16): member posts + depth-1 replies, soft delete (author/instructor+) projected as a placeholder — body never leaks after deletion. tenantId from the lesson row (never args), bounded indexed reads, per-user-per-lesson anti-spam cap. One mounted view: LessonComments({ lessonId }).
notes: 0.1.0 (2026-07-09, agent beta): STATUS row #16 (wave v1.2). Schema table `comments` pre-added by alpha (DATA-MODEL SSOT) — implemented exactly; no schema edits. Depth-1 invariant + same-lesson parent + not-deleted parent enforced in addComment (VALIDATION_FAILED). Soft delete only (deletedAt) — reads return {deleted:true, bodyMd:null, author:null} placeholders; leak asserted against in queries.test.ts. Draft/archived-course lessons stay instructor+ (mirrors courses read rules). Author display joined from profiles (shared-table read, sanctioned). Anti-spam: >=20 comments/user/lesson → RATE_LIMITED (bounded by_lesson scan). Copy-first: adapted from rr `comments` (thread building, adapter seams) — simplified to fixed depth-1, no polymorphic TargetRef, no forbiddenWords.
